title: Chytroma labriculata
taxonomy: Chytroma labriculata is a species of fungus in the family Chytridiaceae. It belongs to the phylum Zygomycota and kingdom Fungi. The classification of Chytroma labriculata is as follows: Domain: Eukarya, Kingdom: Fungi, Phylum: Zygomycota, Class: Chytridiomycetes, Order: Chytridiales, Family: Chytridiaceae, Genus: Chytroma, Species: C. labriculata. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. The fungus is an aquatic, heterothallic organism.
